name: Deluxe Vegetable Calzone
recipeIngredient: 3 ounces Vegetables, stir-fried (onions, green pepper, carrots, zucchini, mushrooms, broccoli)
recipeInstructions:
1. Roll out the pizza dough and place it on a lightly greased 7-inch pizza pan. Pat with your hands to fit the pan.
2. Spread the cheese sauce evenly along the edge of the dough, leaving a half-inch space from the rim.
3. Place the stir-fried vegetables along half of the dough. Fold the dough over and seal the edges. Crimp them together and prick the top generously with a fork.
4. Bake in a preheated 375°F convection oven for 8-10 minutes, or until the crust is golden brown. Serve.
Makes 1 small calzone.
